title: Creating a table from a complex query crashes mserver or triggers assertion
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE ep (pde_id TEXT, bene_id TEXT, srvc_dt TEXT, prod_srvc_id TEXT, plan_cntrct_rec_id TEXT, plan_pbp_rec_num TEXT, qty_dspnsd_num REAL, days_suply_num REAL, drug_cvrg_stus_cd TEXT, ctstrphc_cvrg_cd TEXT, ptnt_pay_amt REAL, othr_troop_amt REAL, lics_amt REAL, plro_amt REAL, cvrd_d_plan_pd_amt REAL, ncvrd_plan_pd_amt REAL, tot_rx_cst_amt REAL, benefit_phase TEXT, ccw_pharmacy_id REAL, ccw_prscrbr_id REAL, pde_prscrbr_id_frmt_cd TEXT, formulary_id TEXT, frmlry_rx_id TEXT, rptd_gap_dscnt_num REAL, brnd_gnrc_cd TEXT, rx_c_cov REAL, rx_c_lics REAL, rx_c_tpc REAL, rx_c_tdc REAL, rx_c_oop REAL, rx_c_gdc REAL, rx_e_cov REAL, rx_e_lics REAL, rx_e_tpc REAL, rx_e_tdc REAL, rx_e_oop REAL, rx_e_gdc REAL, rx_o_cov REAL, rx_o_lics REAL, rx_o_tpc REAL, rx_o_tdc REAL, rx_o_oop REAL, rx_o_gdc REAL, rx_ce_cov REAL, rx_ce_lics REAL, rx_ce_tpc REAL, rx_ce_tdc REAL, rx_ce_oop REAL, rx_ce_gdc REAL, rx_co_cov REAL, rx_co_lics REAL, rx_co_tpc REAL, rx_co_tdc REAL, rx_co_oop REAL, rx_co_gdc REAL, rx_eo_cov REAL, rx_eo_lics REAL, rx_eo_tpc REAL, rx_eo_tdc REAL, rx_eo_oop REAL, rx_eo_gdc REAL, rx_ceo_cov REAL, rx_ceo_lics REAL, rx_ceo_tpc REAL, rx_ceo_tdc REAL, rx_ceo_oop REAL, rx_ceo_gdc REAL);

CREATE TABLE aep13 AS SELECT bene_id, CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN drug_cvrg_stus_cd IN ('c') THEN ccw_prscrbr_id END) AS REAL) AS rx_c_pre, CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN drug_cvrg_stus_cd IN ('c') THEN ccw_pharmacy_id END) AS REAL) AS rx_c_pha FROM ep GROUP BY bene_id;
CREATE TABLE temp_table AS SELECT * FROM ep WHERE qty_dspnsd_num > 0 AND days_suply_num IS NOT NULL;

INSERT INTO temp_table (pde_id, bene_id, srvc_dt, prod_srvc_id, plan_cntrct_rec_id, plan_pbp_rec_num, qty_dspnsd_num, days_suply_num, drug_cvrg_stus_cd) VALUES ('P002', 'B002', '2023-01-02', 'P002', 'C002', 'PB002', 20.0, 15.0, 'c');
